data.name: COLORIMETRY_EXCEPTION_UNKNOWNERROR1
data.value: General error!

data.name: COLORIMETRY_SERIALIZER_EXCEPTION_READERROR1
data.value: Can't determine how to convert a(n) {0} of {1} to a color.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_SERIALIZER_EXCEPTION_READERROR2
data.value: Can't determine how to convert a(n) {0} of an unknown type to a color.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_SERIALIZER_EXCEPTION_WRITEERROR
data.value: Can't get color.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_DATA_EXCEPTION_COLOROUTOFRANGE
data.value: Color is out of range.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_DATA_EXCEPTION_COLORNODATA
data.value: Can't get color data.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_GRADIENT_EXCEPTION_GRADIENTNULL
data.value: Are you sure that this gradient is not null?

data.name: COLORIMETRY_GRADIENT_EXCEPTION_COLORNEEDED
data.value: Specify at least one color.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDCIELABSPECIFIER
data.value: Invalid CieLab color specifier "{0}". Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSECIELABLLEVEL
data.value: The L value is out of range (0.0 -> 100.0).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSECIELABALEVEL
data.value: The A value is out of range (-128.0 -> 128.0).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSECIELABBLEVEL
data.value: The B value is out of range (-128.0 -> 128.0).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_ILLUMINANCEINVALIDOBSERVER
data.value: Observer must be either 2 or 10

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_ILLUMINANCEINVALIDILLUMINANT
data.value: Illuminant is invalid

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDCIELABSPECIFIEREXCEED
data.value: Invalid CieLab color specifier "{0}". The specifier may not be more than three elements. Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDCIELCHSPECIFIER
data.value: Invalid CieLch color specifier "{0}". Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSECIELCHCLEVEL
data.value: The C value is out of range (-128.0 -> 128.0).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSECIELCHHLEVEL
data.value: The H value is out of range (-128.0 -> 128.0).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDCIELCHSPECIFIEREXCEED
data.value: Invalid CieLch color specifier "{0}". The specifier may not be more than three elements. Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDCIELUVSPECIFIER
data.value: Invalid CieLuv color specifier "{0}". Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSECIELUVULEVEL
data.value: The U value is out of range (-134.0 -> 220.0).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSECIELUVVLEVEL
data.value: The V value is out of range (-140.0 -> 122.0).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDCIELUVSPECIFIEREXCEED
data.value: Invalid CieLuv color specifier "{0}". The specifier may not be more than three elements. Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_NOSOURCE
data.value: Can't convert null source.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_NOTYPE
data.value: Can't convert to null type.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_SPECIFYSOURCEMODEL
data.value: You should specify a specific source color model, not the base one.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_NOTSOURCEMODEL
data.value: Not a color model.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_SPECIFYTARGETMODEL
data.value: You should specify a specific target color model, not the base one.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_NOTTARGETMODEL
data.value: Not a target color model.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_SAMEMODEL
data.value: Can't convert same color model.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_TORGBFAILED
data.value: Can't convert to RGB.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_FROMBASEFAILED
data.value: Can't convert from base color model.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_TOCMYKFAILED
data.value: Can't convert to CMYK.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_TOCMYFAILED
data.value: Can't convert to CMY.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_TOHSLFAILED
data.value: Can't convert to HSL.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_TOHSVFAILED
data.value: Can't convert to HSV.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_TORYBFAILED
data.value: Can't convert to RYB.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_TOYIQFAILED
data.value: Can't convert to YIQ.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_TOYUVFAILED
data.value: Can't convert to YUV.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_TOXYZFAILED
data.value: Can't convert to XYZ.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_TOYXYFAILED
data.value: Can't convert to YXY.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_TOHUNTERLABFAILED
data.value: Can't convert to HunterLab.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_TOCIELABFAILED
data.value: Can't convert to CieLab.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_TOCIELUVFAILED
data.value: Can't convert to CieLuv.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_TOCIELCHFAILED
data.value: Can't convert to CieLch.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_TOHWBFAILED
data.value: Can't convert to HWB.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_FROMRGBFAILED
data.value: Can't convert from RGB.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_TOCMYNULLRGB
data.value: Can't convert a null RGB instance to CMY!

data.value: Can't convert a null RGB instance to CMYK!

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDCMYSPECIFIER
data.value: Invalid CMY color specifier "{0}". Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSECMYCLEVEL
data.value: The cyan color level is out of range (0 -> 100).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSECMYMLEVEL
data.value: The magenta color level is out of range (0 -> 100).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSECMYYLEVEL
data.value: The yellow color level is out of range (0 -> 100).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDCMYSPECIFIEREXCEED
data.value: Invalid CMY color specifier "{0}". The specifier may not be more than three elements. Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDCMYKSPECIFIER
data.value: Invalid CMYK color specifier "{0}". Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSECMYKKLEVEL
data.value: The black color level is out of range (0 -> 100).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDCMYKSPECIFIEREXCEED
data.value: Invalid CMYK color specifier "{0}". The specifier may not be more than four elements. Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDHSLSPECIFIER
data.value: Invalid HSL color specifier "{0}". Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEHSLHLEVEL
data.value: The hue level is out of range (0' -> 360' degrees).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEHSLSLEVEL
data.value: The saturation level is out of range (0 -> 100).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEHSLLLEVEL
data.value: The lightness level is out of range (0 -> 100).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDHSLSPECIFIEREXCEED
data.value: Invalid HSL color specifier "{0}". The specifier may not be more than three elements. Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDHSVSPECIFIER
data.value: Invalid HSV color specifier "{0}". Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEHSVVLEVEL
data.value: The value level is out of range (0 -> 100).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDHSVSPECIFIEREXCEED
data.value: Invalid HSV color specifier "{0}". The specifier may not be more than three elements. Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDHWBSPECIFIER
data.value: Invalid HWB color specifier "{0}". Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEHWBWLEVEL
data.value: The whiteness level is out of range (0 -> 100).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEHWBBLEVEL
data.value: The blackness level is out of range (0 -> 100).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDHWBSPECIFIEREXCEED
data.value: Invalid HWB color specifier "{0}". The specifier may not be more than three elements. Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDHUNTERLABSPECIFIER
data.value: Invalid HunterLab color specifier "{0}". Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEHUNTERLABALEVEL
data.value: The A value is out of range (-128.0 -> 127.0).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEHUNTERLABBLEVEL
data.value: The B value is out of range (-128.0 -> 127.0).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDHUNTERLABSPECIFIEREXCEED
data.value: Invalid HunterLab color specifier "{0}". The specifier may not be more than three elements. Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDYUVSPECIFIER
data.value: Invalid YUV color specifier "{0}". Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEYUVYLEVEL
data.value: The luma level is out of range (0 -> 255).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEYUVULEVEL
data.value: The chroma (U) level is out of range (0 -> 255).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEYUVVLEVEL
data.value: The chroma (V) level is out of range (0 -> 255).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDYUVSPECIFIEREXCEED
data.value: Invalid YUV color specifier "{0}". The specifier may not be more than three elements. Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDYIQSPECIFIER
data.value: Invalid YIQ color specifier "{0}". Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEYIQILEVEL
data.value: The in-phase level is out of range (0 -> 255).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEYIQQLEVEL
data.value: The quadrature level is out of range (0 -> 255).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDYIQSPECIFIEREXCEED
data.value: Invalid YIQ color specifier "{0}". The specifier may not be more than three elements. Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_ILLUMINANCENOREFERENCE
data.value: Can't get references from the table

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDSPECIFIER
data.value: Invalid color specifier "{0}". If you're using 256 colors, you'll need to enter a positive value from 0 to 255 or a valid color name. If you're using true color, you'll either need to write a valid color specifier, such as RRR;GGG;BBB, or a color code up to 16777215.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSERGBREDLEVEL
data.value: The red color level is out of range (0 -> 255).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSERGBGREENLEVEL
data.value: The green color level is out of range (0 -> 255).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSERGBBLUELEVEL
data.value: The blue color level is out of range (0 -> 255).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDHEXSPECIFIER
data.value: Invalid color hex specifier "{0}". This specifier must start with the hash tag. Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDHEXLENGTH
data.value: Invalid color hex length "{0}". Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEHEXUNRESOLVABLE
data.value: Can't resolve color hex "{0}".

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSERGBISORIGINALCOLOR
data.value: This color is already an original color.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDRGBSPECIFIER
data.value: Invalid color specifier "{0}". Ensure that it's on the correct format, which means a number from 0-255 if using 255 colors or a VT sequence if using true color as follows

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDRGBSPECIFIEREXCEED
data.value: Invalid color specifier "{0}". The specifier may not be more than three elements. Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDRYBSPECIFIER
data.value: Invalid RYB color specifier "{0}". Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSERYBRLEVEL
data.value: The red level is out of range (0 -> 255).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSERYBYLEVEL
data.value: The yellow level is out of range (0 -> 255).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSERYBBLEVEL
data.value: The blue level is out of range (0 -> 255).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDRYBSPECIFIEREXCEED
data.value: Invalid RYB color specifier "{0}". The specifier may not be more than three elements. Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDXYZSPECIFIER
data.value: Invalid XYZ color specifier "{0}". Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEXYZXLEVEL
data.value: The X value is out of range (0.0 -> 95.047).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEXYZYLEVEL
data.value: The Y value is out of range (0.0 -> 100.0).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEXYZZLEVEL
data.value: The Z value is out of range (0.0 -> 108.883).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDXYZSPECIFIEREXCEED
data.value: Invalid XYZ color specifier "{0}". The specifier may not be more than three elements. Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDYXYSPECIFIER
data.value: Invalid YXY color specifier "{0}". Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEYXYY1LEVEL
data.value: The Y1 value is out of range (0.0 -> 100.0).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEYXYX1LEVEL
data.value: The X value is out of range (0.0 -> 1.0).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEYXYY2LEVEL
data.value: The Y2 value is out of range (0.0 -> 1.0).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDYXYSPECIFIEREXCEED
data.value: Invalid YXY color specifier "{0}". The specifier may not be more than three elements. Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_CONTRAST_EXCEPTION_INVALIDTYPE
data.value: Color type is invalid

data.name: COLORIMETRY_CONTRAST_EXCEPTION_INVALIDSPECIFIER
data.value: Color specifier for seeability is invalid

data.name: COLORIMETRY_FORMULAS_EXCEPTION_INVALIDMONOCHROMACYTYPE
data.value: Invalid monochromacy type

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_TOYPBPRFAILED
data.value: Can't convert to YPbPr.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_TOYDBDRFAILED
data.value: Can't convert to YDbDr.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_TOLMSFAILED
data.value: Can't convert to LMS.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_TOYPBPRNULLRGB
data.value: Can't convert a null RGB instance to YPbPr!

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_TOYDBDRNULLRGB
data.value: Can't convert a null RGB instance to YDbDr!

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_TOLMSNULLRGB

data.value: Can't convert a null LMS instance to RGB!

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDLMSSPECIFIER
data.value: Invalid LMS color specifier "{0}". Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSELMSLLEVEL
data.value: The L value is out of range (0.0 -> 1.0).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSELMSMLEVEL
data.value: The M value is out of range (0.0 -> 1.0).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSELMSSLEVEL
data.value: The S value is out of range (0.0 -> 1.0).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDLMSSPECIFIEREXCEED
data.value: Invalid LMS color specifier "{0}". The specifier may not be more than three elements. Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDYDBDRSPECIFIER
data.value: Invalid YDbDr color specifier "{0}". Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEYDBDRYLEVEL
data.value: The Y value is out of range (0.0 -> 1.0).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEYDBDRDBLEVEL
data.value: The Db value is out of range (−1.333 -> 1.333).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEYDBDRDRLEVEL

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDYDBDRSPECIFIEREXCEED
data.value: Invalid YDbDr color specifier "{0}". The specifier may not be more than three elements. Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDYPBPRSPECIFIER
data.value: Invalid YPbPr color specifier "{0}". Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEYPBPRYLEVEL
data.value: The Y value is out of range (0.0 -> 750.0).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEYPBPRPBLEVEL

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEYPBPRPRLEVEL

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDYPBPRSPECIFIEREXCEED
data.value: Invalid YPbPr color specifier "{0}". The specifier may not be more than three elements. Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_TOYCBCRFAILED
data.value: Can't convert to YCbCr.

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_TOYCBCRNULLRGB
data.value: Can't convert a null RGB instance to YCbCr!

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_TORGBNULLYCBCR
data.value: Can't convert a null YCbCr instance to RGB!

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDYCBCRSPECIFIER
data.value: Invalid YCbCr color specifier "{0}". Ensure that it's on the correct format

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEYCBCRYLEVEL
data.value: The Y value is out of range (16 -> 235).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEYCBCRCBLEVEL
data.value: The Cb value is out of range (16 -> 240).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEYCBCRCRLEVEL
data.value: The Cr value is out of range (16 -> 240).

data.name: COLORIMETRY_MODEL_EXCEPTION_PARSEINVALIDYCBCRSPECIFIEREXCEED
data.value: Invalid YCbCr color specifier "{0}". The specifier may not be more than three elements. Ensure that it's on the correct format
